content.problemStatement: You are given a string of size $N$. Count the number of distinct characters in it and also frequency of each character.
constraints:
- $1 \leq T, N \leq 100$
- All characters of the strings are lowercase alphabet.
content.inputFormat:
- First line of the input contains a positive integer $T$ - the number of test cases
- The first line of each test case contains an integer $N$ — the size of string. 
- The second line of each test case contains a string of size $N$.
content.outputFormat:
- For each test case:
  - output on a new line an integer $K$ -  the number of distinct characters in string.
  - on $K$ next lines print two space separated values - the character and its frequency. Characters should be printed in sorted order (i.e. from `a` to `z`).

sampleTestCases.explanation: The input contains only one test case with a string `abdadcdca`, which has only 4 distinct characters in it: `a` which has frequency 3, `b` with frequency 1, `c` with frequency 2 and `d` with frequency 3.
